MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BEACON BUSINESS BANK, N.A.'S Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is continued on the court's own motion to July 7, 2020. Plaintiffs may file a reply to defendants' opposition no later than June 29.
